login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Enter your details to get started
register.name: Full name
register.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.success: Reset link sent to your email

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordStrength: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character

hero.title: Production-Ready SaaS Starter
hero.subtitle: A complete frontend architecture with authentication, theming, and internationalization. Built with React, TypeScript, and modern best practices.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: A scalable, feature-based architecture ready for production deployment.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Complete auth flow with login, register, password reset, and Zod validation.

darkMode.title: Dark Mode
darkMode.description: System-aware theme switching with light, dark, and system modes.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Multi-language support with i18next. Currently supports English and Spanish.

stack.title: Modern Stack
stack.description: Built with React, TypeScript, Zustand, and TanStack Query.

architecture.title: Feature-Based Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Organized by features for maximum scalability and maintainability. Each feature contains its own pages, components, hooks, services, store, types, and schemas.

home.footer: Built with Vite, React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Zustand, and TanStack Query.
